title: The Hazy Spring Moon Above
overview: Saku Chitose is an elite student who has an unexpected wrench thrown into his beautiful life.

title: Let's Start Breaking Common Ground
overview: Chitose tries to break down Kenta's barrier and will help him change if he returns to class.

title: A Lonesome Hero
overview: Kenta's progress hits some bumps on the road

title: The Marble Moon in the Ramune Bottle
overview: Kenta rides into battle as the three-week period comes to a close.

title: A Fickle Starting Line
overview: Nanase Yuzuki needs a boyfriend, and it has to be Saku Chitose. But why?

title: Blue Basketball Shoes
overview: The situation surrounding Yuzuki grows more serious.

title: Ups and Downs
overview: Yuzuki has won the bet with Saku, and it’s time to cash in.

title: How to End the Unending Rain
overview: The frustrations start to get to Yuzuki and Saku.

title: A Relationship With a Name and a Rift Without One
overview: Saku and Yuzuki share moments from their past that make them reflect.

title: A Distant Moon
overview: The situation with Yuzuki and Yanashita comes to a head.

title: Rainy With a Chance Of…
overview: As the rainy season hangs oppressively over Fukui, a meeting over future plans brightens the day.

title: With a Chance of Dreams
overview: A cloud now hangs above Saku as he learns Asuka may leave to go to Tokyo.

title: The Left-Ear Promise
overview: Asuka decides to fight for her dream, and Saku's right there with her! Is that a good thing or bad?
